[Chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]

[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Bm[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
Baby, take my hand[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]
I don't wanna be a one man band[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
